description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 18 hrs 43 mins coding, with a daily average of 3 hrs 34 mins. His activity included opening 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117. WakaTime shows work across four projects, with the most-used languages being Python, Markdown, SQL, and TypeScript.
